# Find out what websites are Built With

Your browser does not support the video tag.

[Create a Free Lead List](https://builtwith.com/signup)

## Sales Teams

Identify companies adopting competitor tools in real time. Build high intent lists using tech signals, spend, and lifecycle events, pushed directly into your CRM and fully exportable.

## AI & Engineering Teams

Track Verified AI Adoption - Discover companies using AI agents, MCP servers, llms.txt, AI SDKs, inference APIs, and modern developer infrastructure while integrating directly with BuiltWith using our AI-ready APIs, MCP tools, and developer SDKs.

## Investors and Analysts

Use 20+ years of adoption data to validate investments. Spot emerging winners and declining incumbents across 114k+ technologies.

# Internet Technology Trends

BuiltWith® covers 114,356+ internet technologies which include analytics, advertising, hosting, CMS and many more. See how the internet technology usage changes on a weekly basis. With BuiltWith.com Technology Trends data back to January 1985.

## eCommerce Data

BuiltWith® tracks over 2500 eCommerce technologies and 2 billion unique eCommerce products across over 26 million eCommerce websites backed with extensive exportable attributes including spend, revenue, employee count, social media count, industry, location, rank and many more.

[View Trends](https://trends.builtwith.com/) [View Products](https://builtwith.com/ecommerce)

## Features

[Lead Generation](https://builtwith.com/lead-generation)

[Market Analysis](https://builtwith.com/market-analysis)

[Sales Intelligence](https://builtwith.com/sales-intelligence)

[Data Coverage](https://builtwith.com/data-coverage)

[Cyber Risk Auditing](https://builtwith.com/cyber-risk)

[AI](https://builtwith.com/artificial-intelligence)

[Report Filtering](https://builtwith.com/report-filtering)

[Financial Data](https://builtwith.com/alternative-data)

[Future Customers](https://builtwith.com/future-customers)

[API Access](https://api.builtwith.com/)

[CRM Integrations](https://builtwith.com/crm-integrations)

[Browser Extensions](https://builtwith.com/toolbar)

[All Features](https://builtwith.com/all-features)

[Screencast Demo](https://builtwith.com/screencast)

## Great Company

![Holly](https://builtwith.com/img/customers/faces/holly-nobg.webp)

![Carted](https://builtwith.com/img/customers/faces/carted.webp)

### Holly Cardew

I have been using BuiltWith for years, it's been an incredible tool. At Carted we've used BuiltWith to keep on eye on emerging technology trends and have also been able to research new customer segments and leads.

![Ross](https://builtwith.com/img/customers/faces/ross-nobg.webp)

![Listrak](https://builtwith.com/img/customers/faces/listrak.webp)

### Ross Kramer

BuiltWith has been an integral partner in identifying key market segment opportunities for us.

![Deepak](https://builtwith.com/img/customers/faces/deepak-nobg.webp)

![Pearl Lemon](https://builtwith.com/img/customers/faces/pearllemon.webp)

### Deepak Shukla

Using BuiltWith's tools we've already won two clients who've spent close to $60,000 with us.

![Thomas](https://builtwith.com/img/customers/faces/thomas-nobg.webp)

![Mouseflow](https://builtwith.com/img/customers/faces/mouseflow.webp)

### Thomas Holm Jensen

BuiltWith gives us the right amount of data mixed with intelligence to find prospects that matter. There's not a better tool to gain a competitive edge.

[View More Testimonials](https://builtwith.com/customers)

## News

![Financial Times](https://builtwith.com/img/news/financialTimes.webp)

[Error-prone AI aids](https://www.ft.com/content/3c877c55-b698-43da-a222-8ae183f53078) \- FT investigation into the struggle with error prone AI aids for blind internet uses backed by BuiltWith data.

![Winton Capital](https://builtwith.com/img/news/winton.webp)

[Technical Leadership Indicators](https://tech.winton.com/) \- World's six largest hedge fund uses BuiltWith data for technology benchmark.

![Harvard](https://builtwith.com/img/news/harvard.webp)

[Is A/B Testing Effective?](https://hbswk.hbs.edu/item/is-ab-testing-effective-evidence-from-35000-startups) \- Harvard uses BuiltWith Data to see if A/B Testing is effective.

![MIT](https://builtwith.com/img/news/mit.webp)

[BuiltWith in MIT Technology Review](https://blog.builtwith.com/2014/03/22/builtwith-data-in-mit-technology-review/) \- MIT used BuiltWith data in their A/B testing research piece.

![WSJ](https://builtwith.com/img/news/wsj.webp)

[WSJ Internet Research Piece](https://blog.builtwith.com/2012/12/08/builtwith-in-the-wsj/) \- Read and watch the Wall Street Journals investigation backed by BuiltWith data.

web.title: How to Add a Technology to BuiltWith
web.description: We add technologies to BuiltWith as a priority, the best way to get your technology added is to use the Technology Suggestion Form.
web.markdown:
[Log In](https://builtwith.com/login) · [Signup for Free](https://builtwith.com/signup)

[EN](https://kb.builtwith.com/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith) [DE](https://kb.builtwith.com/de/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith) [FR](https://kb.builtwith.com/fr/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith) [ES](https://kb.builtwith.com/es/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith) [IT](https://kb.builtwith.com/it/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith) [Русский](https://kb.builtwith.com/ru/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith) [한국어](https://kb.builtwith.com/ko/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith) [日本語](https://kb.builtwith.com/ja/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith) [简体中文](https://kb.builtwith.com/zh/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith) [عربي](https://kb.builtwith.com/ar/general-questions/how-to-add-a-technology-to-builtwith)

Search

We add technologies to BuiltWith as a priority, the best way to get your technology added is to use the [Technology Suggestion Form](http://builtwith.com/suggest).

To increase the speed of addition consider -

2. Adding example sites where the technology is currently in use

4. If you know how it's called (javascript, cookies etc.. let us know in the comment box)

6. Make sure we're not already tracking it, if we are and are missing results [let us know](https://builtwith.com/contact).

Legacy Article

This is a legacy Knowledge Base article.

web.title: CSV and Excel Export for Tech Lookups - BuiltWith Blog
web.description: You can now get Excel/Google Sheet and CSV exports from BuiltWith Technology Profiles. Here's a sample export from the system.
web.markdown:
[Log In](https://builtwith.com/login) · [Signup for Free](https://builtwith.com/signup)

[EN](https://blog.builtwith.com/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/) [DE](https://blog.builtwith.com/de/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/) [FR](https://blog.builtwith.com/fr/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/) [ES](https://blog.builtwith.com/es/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/) [IT](https://blog.builtwith.com/it/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/) [Русский](https://blog.builtwith.com/ru/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/) [한국어](https://blog.builtwith.com/ko/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/) [日本語](https://blog.builtwith.com/ja/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/) [简体中文](https://blog.builtwith.com/zh/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/) [عربي](https://blog.builtwith.com/ar/2022/08/20/csv-and-excel-export-for-tech-lookups/)

CSV and Excel Export for Tech Lookups

You can now get Excel/Google Sheet and CSV exports from BuiltWith Technology Profiles.

![](https://blog.builtwith.com/ig/2022/08/EXCEL-OUTPUT-1024x713.webp)

Here's a sample export from the system -

[sample-domain-excel-output.xlsx](https://blog.builtwith.com/ig/2022/08/sample-domain-excel-output.xlsx)

[Download](https://blog.builtwith.com/ig/2022/08/sample-domain-excel-output.xlsx)

To access these profiles use the Domain API - [https://api.builtwith.com/domain-api](https://api.builtwith.com/domain-api) or click on the XLSX/CSV options in the sidebar when viewing profiles i.e. - [https://builtwith.com/builtwith.com](https://builtwith.com/builtwith.com)

About

BuiltWith® is a website profiler tool that tells you what a website is Built With.

Recent Posts

- [![Websites Promoting Data Sovereignty](https://blog.builtwith.com/ig/426/2026/05/sov-en.webp)](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/05/20/websites-promoting-data-sovereignty/)[Websites Promoting Data Sovereignty](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/05/20/websites-promoting-data-sovereignty/)
- [![Find Websites Investing in AI](https://blog.builtwith.com/ig/426/2026/04/ai-en.webp)](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/04/20/find-websites-investing-in-ai/)[Find Websites Investing in AI](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/04/20/find-websites-investing-in-ai/)
- [![Technology Live Feed API](https://blog.builtwith.com/ig/426/2026/03/wss-en.webp)](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/03/20/technology-live-feed-api/)[Technology Live Feed API](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/03/20/technology-live-feed-api/)
- [![LLMS and MCP](https://blog.builtwith.com/ig/426/2026/02/mcp-en.webp)](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/02/25/llms-and-mcp/)[LLMS and MCP](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/02/25/llms-and-mcp/)
- [![Site Age](https://blog.builtwith.com/ig/426/2026/02/time_en.webp)](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/01/26/site-age/)[Site Age](https://blog.builtwith.com/2026/01/26/site-age/)
